targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ((payload #>> '{record,usage,input_tokens}')::double precision + (payload #>> '{record,usage,output_tokens}')::double precision)) AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 3 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, payload #>> '{record,provider}' AS metric, avg((payload #>> '{record,cost_micros}')::double precision) AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 3 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, COALESCE(payload #>> '{record,finish_reasons,0}', 'unknown') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 3 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, workspace_id::text AS metric, avg((payload #>> '{record,usage,cache_read_tokens}')::double precision / NULLIF((payload #>> '{record,usage,input_tokens}')::double precision, 0)) AS value FROM analytics.turn_lineage WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND record_kind = 3 AND ('$workspace_id' = 'all' OR workspace_id::text = '$workspace_id') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
list.label: workspace_id
list.name: workspace_id
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS workspace_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT workspace_id::text FROM analytics.turn_lineage ORDER BY 1
